title: Cloud Security & Trust Management Framework
description: A layered diagram illustrating the core components of cloud security and how trust is established and managed between the cloud service provider and consumer.
relationships: Consumer interacts with and places trust in the CSP
CSP implements and manages Security Controls across all Service Layers
Trust Management System (featuring SLAs, certifications, transparency) validates security and builds consumer trust
Third-Party Auditors provide independent verification of the CSP's security claims
